message.content:
I'll analyze this InsuranceHub mobile app design in extreme detail, breaking down every visual element with precise specifications to ensure exact replication.


### **1. HEADER/NAVIGATION BAR**
- **Background Color**: Solid black (`#000000`)
- **Text Color**: White (`#FFFFFF`)
- **Text Size**: 14px (for status bar icons like battery, signal)
- **Layout**: 
  - Left-aligned hamburger menu icon (3 horizontal lines, white, 24px)
  - Center: Status bar icons (signal, Wi-Fi, battery) in white, 14px
  - Right: Battery icon (white, 14px)
- **Spacing**: 12px padding on left/right, 8px top/bottom
- **Badges/Icons**: None present in header


### **2. BUTTONS**
#### **Primary Yellow Buttons** (e.g., "LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS", "NEXT")
- **Shape**: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
- **Border-Radius**: 4px
- **Padding**: 12px 24px (vertical/horizontal)
- **Font-Weight**: Bold (`700`)
- **Text-Transform**: Uppercase
- **Colors**: 
  - Background: Bright yellow (`#FFD700`)
  - Text: Black (`#000000`)
  - Border: None

#### **Secondary Black Buttons** (e.g., "FAQs", "COMMON QUESTIONS")
- **Shape**: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
- **Border-Radius**: 4px
- **Padding**: 8px 16px
- **Font-Weight**: Medium (`500`)
- **Text-Transform**: Uppercase
- **Colors**: 
  - Background: Black (`#000000`)
  - Text: White (`#FFFFFF`)
  - Border: None

#### **White Text Buttons** (e.g., "Take the Quiz!")
- **Shape**: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
- **Border-Radius**: 4px
- **Padding**: 8px 16px
- **Font-Weight**: Medium (`500`)
- **Text-Transform**: Sentence case (first letter uppercase)
- **Colors**: 
  - Background: Light blue (`#87CEEB`)
  - Text: White (`#FFFFFF`)
  - Border: None

#### **Dark Text Buttons** (e.g., "PLAN COMPARISON")
- **Shape**: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
- **Border-Radius**: 4px
- **Padding**: 8px 16px
- **Font-Weight**: Medium (`500`)
- **Text-Transform**: Sentence case
- **Colors**: 
  - Background: Transparent
  - Text: Black (`#000000`)
  - Border: None


### **3. CARDS**
- **Border Style**: Solid 1px black (`#000000`)
- **Border-Radius**: 0px (sharp corners)
- **Shadow**: None (flat design)
- **Padding**: 16px
- **Background Color**: White (`#FFFFFF`)
- **Inner Layout**: 
  - Top: Section header (e.g., "ADVISOR MODE")
  - Middle: Content (buttons, text)
  - Bottom: Spacing (16px margin)


### **4. SECTIONS**
- **Division**: Horizontal dividers (1px black line) between sections
- **Spacing**: 24px margin between sections
- **Section Title Style**: 
  - Font-Size: 18px
  - Font-Weight: Bold (`700`)
  - Text-Transform: Uppercase
  - Color: Black (`#000000`)
  - Icon Placement: Left-aligned (e.g., arrow icon for "FAQ TRAINING")


### **5. COLOR PALETTE**
| Element                | Hex Code   |
|------------------------|------------|
| Primary Yellow         | `#FFD700`  |
| Light Blue             | `#87CEEB`  |
| Black (Background)     | `#000000`  |
| White (Background)     | `#FFFFFF`  |
| Black (Text)           | `#000000`  |
| White (Text)           | `#FFFFFF`  |
| Accent Green (Badge)    | `#ADFF2F`  |
| Accent Blue (Badge)     | `#1E90FF`  |


### **6. TYPOGRAPHY**
- **Font Family**: Sans-serif (e.g., Arial, Helvetica)
- **Font Weights**: 
  - Headers: Bold (`700`)
  - Buttons: Medium (`500`)
  - Body Text: Regular (`400`)
- **Letter-Spacing**: 0.5px (subtle spacing)
- **Line-Height**: 1.5 (for readability)
- **Text-Transform Rules**: 
  - Buttons: Uppercase (primary/secondary)
  - Section Titles: Uppercase
  - Body Text: Sentence case


### **7. SPACING**
- **Margin/Padding Patterns**: 
  - Card Padding: 16px
  - Button Padding: 8-12px vertical, 16-24px horizontal
  - Section Spacing: 24px
  - List Item Spacing: 8px between items


### **8. BADGES**
- **Shape**: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
- **Color**: 
  - Yellow (`#FFD700`) for "ADVISOR MODE"
  - Light blue (`#87CEEB`) for "CLIENT MODE"
- **Text Style**: 
  - Font-Size: 14px
  - Font-Weight: Bold (`700`)
  - Text-Transform: Uppercase
  - Color: Black (`#000000`)


### **9. QUIZ ELEMENTS**
- **Button/Card Style for Options**: 
  - Shape: Rectangular with rounded corners (border-radius: 4px)
  - Padding: 12px 16px
  - Font-Weight: Medium (`500`)
  - Text-Transform: Uppercase
- **Color Coding**: 
  - "ADVENTUROUS TRAVELER": Orange (`#FFA500`)
  - "BUSY PROFESSIONAL": Light blue (`#87CEEB`)
  - "FAMILY FOCUSED": Yellow (`#FFD700`)


### **10. LIST ITEMS**
- **Spacing**: 8px margin between list items
- **Borders**: None (separated by spacing)
- **Style**: 
  - Buttons with icons (e.g., "BROCHURES" with document icon)
  - Text: Uppercase, medium weight (`500`)


### **11. PROGRESS INDICATORS**
- **Type**: None visible in the design
- **Alternative**: Step indicators (if present) would use dots (4px diameter) in black (`#000000`)


### **12. ICON STYLE**
- **Size**: 16-24px (consistent across all icons)
- **Color**: 
  - Black (`#000000`) for most icons
  - White (`#FFFFFF`) for icons on black backgrounds
- **Placement**: Left-aligned with text (e.g., arrow icon before "LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS")


### **13. OVERALL VISUAL HIERARCHY**
1. **Primary Attention**: Large yellow "LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS" button (bright color, bold text)
2. **Secondary Attention**: Section headers (e.g., "ADVISOR MODE", "CLIENT MODE") (uppercase, bold)
3. **Tertiary Attention**: Quiz options (color-coded, prominent placement)


### **Pixel-Level Details (Example: Homepage Card)**
- **Card Dimensions**: 320px width × 480px height (standard mobile screen)
- **"ADVISOR MODE" Badge**: 120px width × 32px height, 4px border-radius, 8px padding
- **"LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS" Button**: 280px width × 48px height, 4px border-radius, 12px padding
- **"FAQs" Button**: 80px width × 32px height, 4px border-radius, 8px padding
- **Spacing**: 16px between "ADVISOR MODE" badge and "LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS" button


This breakdown ensures every element is replicated exactly, from color codes to spacing and typography. The design follows a bold, high-contrast aesthetic with a focus on clarity and user engagement.
